BOARD’S REPORT
To,
The Members of
Swiggy Limited
Your directors are presenting the Eleventh Annual Report together with the Audited financial statements
and the Auditors’ Report on the business and operations of your Company for the financial year ended
March 31, 2024.
1. FINANCIAL SUMMARY
The standalone performance as per standalone financial statements is as under:
